title: Alberta auditor general probing procurement and contracting processes within health authority
author: Janet French
notes: AG Doug Wylie launches investigation into AHS procurement. Covers: chartered surgical facilities, Turkish medication, COVID PPE. Globe and Mail reported former CEO Mentzelopoulos fired days before she was to meet auditor general. AHS board replaced by Deputy Minister Tremblay as administrator. Nenshi: 'strongest allegations I have ever seen against an Alberta government.' Anchors EVT-068.
